parameters.query:
SELECT incoming.app_id as game_id
FROM jsonb_to_recordset($1::jsonb) AS incoming(
    app_id text, 
    publisher_id text, 
    updated_date text, 
    active boolean, 
    name text,
    icon_url text,
    publisher_country text
)
LEFT JOIN game_info gi ON gi.game_id = incoming.app_id
WHERE gi.game_id IS NULL 
   OR gi.publisher_id IS DISTINCT FROM incoming.publisher_id
   OR gi.update_release IS DISTINCT FROM (NULLIF(incoming.updated_date, '')::timestamp)::date
   OR gi.is_active IS DISTINCT FROM incoming.active
   OR gi.title IS DISTINCT FROM incoming.name
   OR gi.icon_url IS DISTINCT FROM incoming.icon_url
   OR gi.publisher_country IS DISTINCT FROM incoming.publisher_country
  OR gi.type = 'invalid_countries';
